name: dockerfile
description: Dockerfile — instructions to build Docker container images

globalOptions.name: --platform
globalOptions.description: Set target platform for the build (e.g., linux/amd64)

globalOptions.name: --mount=type=cache
globalOptions.description: Mount a cache directory during RUN to speed up builds

globalOptions.name: --mount=type=secret
globalOptions.description: Mount a secret file during RUN without baking into image

globalOptions.name: --from=stage
globalOptions.description: Copy files from a named build stage

globalOptions.name: --chmod=permissions
globalOptions.description: Set file permissions on copied files

subcommands.name: FROM
subcommands.description: Set the base image for the build stage

subcommands.name: RUN
subcommands.description: Execute a command during the image build

subcommands.name: CMD
subcommands.description: Set default command for the container

subcommands.name: ENTRYPOINT
subcommands.description: Set the main executable for the container

subcommands.name: COPY
subcommands.description: Copy files from build context into image

subcommands.name: ADD
subcommands.description: Copy files/URLs/archives into image with extraction

subcommands.name: WORKDIR
subcommands.description: Set the working directory for subsequent instructions

subcommands.name: ENV
subcommands.description: Set environment variable in the image

subcommands.name: EXPOSE
subcommands.description: Declare the port the container listens on

subcommands.name: HEALTHCHECK
subcommands.description: Define a health check command for the container

subcommands.name: USER
subcommands.description: Set the user for subsequent instructions and runtime

subcommands.name: VOLUME
subcommands.description: Create a mount point for external volumes

subcommands.name: SHELL
subcommands.description: Override the default shell for RUN commands

subcommands.name: STOPSIGNAL
subcommands.description: Set the system call signal for container exit

examples: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
